basic_details.job_title: IIT ISM Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad (IIT (ISM) Dhanbad) has released the official ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF JRF) Recruitment 2026 notification on its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF JRF) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a B.E./ B.Tech/ M.Tech/ MCA/ M.Sc. in Computer Science, Mathematics, Mathematics & Computing, Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or related fields along with a valid GATE or NET qualification can apply throug

age_limit.details: All Posts: Age relaxation will be applicable as per the norms of the Govt. of India/DST-ANRF for JRF recruitment.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./ B.Tech/ M.Tech/ MCA/ M.Sc in Computer Science, Mathematics, Mathematics & Computing, Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or related fields with GATE or NET qualification
qualification.details: ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF-JRF): B.E./B.Tech/M.Tech/MCA/M.Sc in Computer Science, Mathematics, Mathematics & Computing, Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or related fields. The candidate must have qualified GATE or NET.

salary_details.details: ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF-JRF): 37000 (1st & 2nd Year) and 42000 (3rd Year) per month + HRA

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT (ISM) Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF-JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF-JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_ism_dhanb: B.E./ B.Tech/ M.Tech/ MCA/ M.Sc in Computer Science, Mathematics, Mathematics & Computing, Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or related fields with GATE or NET qualification

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT (ISM) Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF-JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF-JRF): B.E./B.Tech/M.Tech/MCA/M.Sc in Computer Science, Mathematics, Mathematics & Computing, Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or related fields. The candidate must have qualified GATE or NET.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: All Posts: Age relaxation will be applicable as per the norms of the Govt. of India/DST-ANRF for JRF recruitment.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF-JRF): 37000 (1st & 2nd Year) and 42000 (3rd Year) per month + HRA

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT (ISM) Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF-JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF-JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT (ISM) Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF-JRF) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF-JRF) post at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad is 10 July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in IIT (ISM) Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF-JRF) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF-JRF) post in the current recruitment drive by IIT (ISM) Dhanbad. This is a specialized position for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for IIT (ISM) Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF-JRF) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF-JRF) recruitment at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad. This makes it accessible for all eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF-JRF) at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad?
faq.answer: The salary for ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF-JRF) is Rs. 37,000 per month for the 1st & 2nd year, and Rs. 42,000 per month for the 3rd year, plus HRA. This competitive stipend is offered for the contractual position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF-JRF) post at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad is via Email. Candidates need to send their complete application and documents to the official email address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What are the essential qualifications for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF-JRF) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a B.E./B.Tech/M.Tech/MCA/M.Sc in relevant fields like Computer Science, Mathematics, Electrical, Electronics, AI, or Data Science. Additionally, a GATE or NET qualification is mandatory for this position.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Specific minimum and maximum age limits are not mentioned, but age relaxation will be applicable as per the norms of the Government of India and DST-ANRF for JRF recruitment. Candidates should refer to the official notification for details.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF-JRF)?
faq.answer: The selection process for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF-JRF) position involves two main stages: shortlisting based on merit of applications, followed by an interview for the shortlisted candidates. Performance in the interview will be crucial.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for this ANRF Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The job location for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF-JRF) position is Dhanbad, Jharkhand, at the Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad. This offers an opportunity to work in a premier educational institution.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this ANRF Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: This ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF-JRF) position at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad is a contractual job. It offers a fixed tenure for research work, providing valuable experience in a government-affiliated institution.
